query: Megalopolis Unbound director cut New Year screening plans

mako.raw:
{"query":"Megalopolis Unbound director cut New Year screening plans","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1370,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.sfchronicle.com/entertainment/article/francis-ford-coppola-megalopolis-directors-cut-21216863.php","title":"Francis Ford Coppola to release ‘wild’ director’s cut of ‘Megalopolis’","content":"Francis Ford Coppola plans to release a director’s cut of “Megalopolis” despite the film flopping in the box office last year.
Coppola revealed he is working on a director’s cut of the 2024 sci-fi thriller, titled “Megalopolis Unbound.” It will contain unreleased footage, including scenes with actor Kathryn Hunter, who plays Teresa Cicero, Mayor Cicero’s wife in the film.
Coppola previously alluded to the project when he hosted a special screening at San Francisco’s Palace of Fine Arts in August.
He has also appeared in a behind-the-scenes documentary titled “ Megadoc” and adapted the screenplay into a graphic novel since the film was released in September 2024.
“Megalopolis” faced various obstacles during production, from allegations of inappropriate on-set behavior and crew departures to difficulty securing distribution and an artificial intelligence-generated trailer that included fake quotes from established film critics.
The two were married for 61 years."},{"url":"https://theplaylist.net/megalopolis-unbound-francis-ford-coppola-plots-really-wild-directors-cut-of-his-120-million-passion-project-20251214/","title":"‘Megalopolis Unbound’: Francis Ford Coppola Plots “Really Wild” Director’s Cut Of His $120 Million Passion Project","content":"I think it will come back over 15–20 years.” That long-view thinking is part of how he justifies this new cut.
A “really wild” director’s cut full of restored dream sequences will almost certainly sharpen that divide rather than smooth it out."},{"url":"https://www.toy-people.com/en/?p=106428","title":"Francis Ford Coppola Unfazed by "Megalopolis" Box Office Bomb: Director Teases "Weirder, Wilder" Extended Cut, Hints at 2026 Release","content":"He continues to host small screenings of the film at various events and tours, and now plans to re-edit the entire picture, releasing a brand-new extended cut.
He recently revealed to The Telegraph that the extended cut of "Megalopolis" will be titled "Megalopolis Unbound." While Coppola did not specify a release date for the new version, he hinted it would arrive this year and promised the added content would be "very wild.""},{"url":"https://screenrant.com/megalopolis-movie-re-release-date-confirmed-francis-ford-coppola/","title":"Francis Ford Coppola's $14M Sci-Fi Epic Flop Gets Surprise Theatrical Re-Release To Engage "Fulcrum Of Discussion"","content":"In somewhat of a surprise announcement, the director said on social media that Megalopolis will be re-released on New Year’s Day 2026 in select Alamo Drafthouse locations.
The legendary director reportedly spent $120 million of his own money to make Megalopolis, and saw it gross just $14 million at the box office."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Megalopolis_(film)","title":"Megalopolis (film) - Wikipedia","content":"That year, Coppola and cinematographer Ron Fricke recorded second unit footage of New York, thinking it would be simpler to do so before principal photography, with the 24-frames per second Sony F900 digital camera that George Lucas used for Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace (1999).
On May 16, 2024, the 138-minute film premiered at the 77th Cannes Film Festival in competition for the Palme d'Or.
The film was made available for streaming on Mubi and Netflix in some European countries in September 2025.
